infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This app uses Bluetooth to find and communicate with nearby mesh nodes.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: This app uses Bluetooth to allow nearby mesh nodes to find and communicate with you.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location is required to scan for nearby mesh nodes.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allows taking photos for local status updates.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Select images to share over the mesh network.

web.description: True offline, peer-to-peer mesh messaging for any device.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysPermission: Allow flowdrop to connect to nearby devices.

plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to let you share images over the local mesh.
plugins.cameraPermission: The app uses your camera for snapping mesh-ready status updates.
